title: Anonymous FTP Access Enabled
description: The FTP service (vsftpd 2.3.4) allows anonymous login without credentials. While the anonymous user has limited access, this enables reconnaissance and potential data access to publicly shared files.
evidence:
FTP anonymous login confirmed:
- FTP server status: Connected to 192.168.0.105, Logged in as ftp
- NSE script output: Anonymous FTP login allowed (FTP code 230)
- MCP credential check: anonymous@192.168.0.140:ftp: VALID (access: user)
remediation: Disable anonymous FTP access. Use SFTP instead of FTP for file transfers. If anonymous access is required, ensure it is read-only with minimal file exposure.

suggestions: Add command output demonstrating access or data extraction
